# Webify Solutions

Webify Solutions is a full-stack web development company and educational platform that provides custom software development services and expert-led online courses.

## Company Overview

Webify Solutions builds production-ready full-stack web applications and delivers expert Next.js, React, and TypeScript courses. The company partners with startups, agencies, and enterprises to build fast, scalable, type-safe web and mobile applications using modern full-stack architectures.

## Services

- Custom Software Development
- Full-Stack Web Application Development
- Frontend Development (React, Next.js, TypeScript)
- Backend Development (Node.js, PostgreSQL, Prisma)
- API Development & Integration
- E-commerce Solutions
- SaaS Application Development
- Performance Optimization
- Cloud Deployment & DevOps

## Courses

Webify Solutions offers expert-led online courses covering:
- React Development
- Next.js 14 App Router
- TypeScript
- Full-Stack Architecture
- Database Design with PostgreSQL
- API Development
- Testing & Quality Assurance
- Deployment & CI/CD

## Technology Stack

- Frontend: Next.js 14, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Node.js, Express, Prisma ORM
- Database: PostgreSQL
- Authentication: NextAuth.js
- Deployment: Vercel, Docker
- Testing: Jest, Playwright
- Version Control: Git

## Contact

- Website: https://webify-solutions.vercel.app
- Email: hello@webify-solutions.com
- Location: Remote-First Worldwide

## Key Differentiators

- Production-ready code quality
- 100% code ownership for clients
- Transparent pricing with no hidden fees
- Modern tech stack expertise
- Comprehensive testing and security
- Ongoing support and maintenance options

## Target Audience

- Startups seeking MVP development
- Enterprises requiring custom software solutions
- Developers learning modern web technologies
- Businesses needing technical consultation
- Teams looking for training and upskilling
